name: Lobster Newburg No. 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a skillet and stir in the flour.
2. Add the cream all at once.
3. Cook, stirring constantly, until the sauce thickens and bubbles.
4. Stir a small amount of hot mixture into the egg yolks, then return to the hot mixture; cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
5. Add the lobster meat; heat.
6. Add the wine, lemon juice, and salt.
7. Sprinkle with paprika.
8. Serve in patty shells or toast cups.
